Cause: Windows paths contain \ which breaks inline onclick handlers in JS
Fix: Use data-* attributes + addEventListener delegation instead of inline onclick. Store paths in data-path attribute with escapeAttr().
Keywords: windows backslash onclick inline event path escape

Cause: Mixed forward/back slashes cause file-not-found errors on Windows
Fix: Always use os.path.normpath() on all file paths. Example: path = os.path.normpath(user_input_path)
Keywords: windows path normpath forward backward slash normalize

Cause: Python stdout defaults to cp1252 on Windows causing UnicodeEncodeError for CJK text
Fix: Force UTF-8: sys.stdout = io.TextIOWrapper(sys.stdout.buffer, encoding='utf-8'). Same for sys.stderr.
Keywords: windows utf8 stdout stderr cp1252 unicode encode error

Cause: ffmpeg installed via WinGet is not in PATH by default
Fix: Auto-detect: glob.glob(r'C:\\Users\\*\\AppData\\Local\\Microsoft\\WinGet\\Packages\\*ffmpeg*\\ffmpeg*.exe'). Set ffmpeg_location in yt-dlp opts.
Keywords: ffmpeg winget path detect auto find location

Cause: Git Bash /tmp paths are unreliable and may not persist
Fix: Use absolute Windows paths (C:/Users/.../). Never rely on /tmp in scripts.
Keywords: git bash tmp temporary path absolute windows

Cause: PyInstaller --onefile creates slow startup due to unpacking to temp dir
Fix: Use --onedir instead for large apps. --onefile is only suitable for small CLI tools.
Keywords: pyinstaller onefile onedir slow startup unpack temp

Cause: tkinter filedialog may appear behind other windows on some Windows versions
Fix: Call root.withdraw() before dialog and root.attributes('-topmost', True) for focus.
Keywords: tkinter filedialog withdraw topmost focus behind window

Cause: subprocess.run fails to find executables without shell=True on Windows
Fix: Use full path to executable or shell=True. Example: subprocess.run([full_path_to_exe, arg1, arg2])
Keywords: subprocess shell true windows executable path find

Cause: PhantomJS installation conflicts with yt-dlp JavaScript runtime on Windows
Fix: Set js_runtimes: {'node': {}} in yt-dlp options to force Node.js runtime.
Keywords: phantomjs conflict yt-dlp javascript runtime node windows

Cause: Windows MAX_PATH is 260 characters causing long path errors
Fix: Use \\\\?\\ prefix for long paths or enable LongPathsEnabled in registry. Example: path = '\\\\?\\' + os.path.abspath(path)
Keywords: windows max path 260 long path limit registry

Cause: Cannot delete files being used by another process on Windows
Fix: Retry with exponential backoff: for i in range(5): try: os.remove(path); break; except PermissionError: time.sleep(0.5 * 2**i)
Keywords: windows file lock delete permission error retry

Cause: Port already in use error when starting Flask server
Fix: Check port availability: sock = socket.socket(); result = sock.connect_ex(('127.0.0.1', port)); sock.close(). Or use port 0 for auto-assign.
Keywords: port in use bind error socket check available

Cause: print() fails with non-ASCII on Windows command prompt
Fix: Set PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 environment variable or use io.TextIOWrapper wrapping.
Keywords: windows console encoding print unicode ascii

Cause: os.path.expanduser('~') may fail for non-ASCII Windows usernames
Keywords: windows temp user home expand path unicode username

Cause: WSL paths (/mnt/c/) and Windows paths (C:/) cause confusion
Fix: Convert with wslpath command or manual prefix replacement. Document which environment the script targets.
Keywords: wsl windows path mnt convert mismatch
